_comment: Each key is a runner name. The bridge selects the entry matching its <runner> argument.
spawn: command + args used to start the runner as a child process.
These are STUB commands by default. Real spawn commands must be set by the user either:
2. By editing the spawn array in this file post-install.
The stubs intentionally do nothing harmful — they echo a message and exit,
so the bridge can be tested/validated without a real runner installed.
rate_limit / server_error: arrays of regex patterns matched against runner stderr.
Each string is compiled as a case-insensitive JavaScript RegExp.
On match, the bridge writes .goal/agents/<agent_id>.fault with kind=rate_limit|server_error.
